entitySuffixRule: Must contain "limited liability company" or "limited company," or the abbreviation "LLC," "L.L.C.," "LC," or "L.C." ("limited" may be abbreviated as "Ltd." and "company" as "Co."). Maximum 80 characters, including spaces and punctuation.
distinguishabilityNote: Must be distinguishable on the records of the Georgia Secretary of State from the name of any existing entity or active name reservation, and must not contain words indicating the entity is organized as another entity type (e.g., "corporation," "incorporated," "limited partnership").
nameReservationCostBasis: The $25 filing fee carries a $10 service charge on both online and mail filings, so the real cost is $35. The fee is nonrefundable, and the filing fee is kept even when the name is rejected.
nameReservationProcessingTime: 7 business days online, 15 business days by mail
notes: Banking-related terms require written approval from the Georgia Department of Banking and Finance; insurance-related terms require written approval from the Office of Commissioner of Insurance, and "college" or "university" require approval from the Georgia Nonpublic Postsecondary Education Commission. A reservation request may list up to three names in order of preference; only the first available one is reserved. Reservations cannot be renewed, but an available name may be reserved again after expiry by reapplying and paying again.
